# CWE-427: attacker-controlled directory prepended to PATH for helper lookup.
lang: go
file: CWE-427-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"os"
	"os/exec"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

func RunReportRenderer(c *gin.Context) error {
	userBin := c.PostForm("helper_path")
	_ = os.Setenv("PATH", userBin+string(os.PathListSeparator)+os.Getenv("PATH"))
	cmd := exec.Command("pdftopng", c.PostForm("input"))
	return cmd.Run()
}
